title: Melody of the Deep negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card or lands a hit. Negate the magic card effect and send it to the cemetery, or negate the attack.

plan.title: Melody of the Deep negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to opponent magic with Melody of the Deep and verify the triggering magic is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Melody of the Deep is in player_1 hand.
Player_2 plays a standard magic card to open the response window.

steps: Player_1 plays Melody of the Deep as the Lightning response.
Resolve chain and verify original magic is negated.

expectedAssertions.label: Melody of the Deep sent to cemetery

manualVerification: The same card also has an attack-negation mode when the opponent lands a hit.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to deterministic headless coverage for this parsed Gen 2 effect.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_053_melody_of_the_deep-053-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
